title: Contemporary Ethnographies of Work and Employment: Close Encounters of the Labouring Kind
abstract: Review article: Sanders, T. (2005) 'Sex Work: A Risky Business' Devon: Willan Publishing(ISBN: 1843920824) Bone, J. (2006) 'The Hard Sell: An Ethnographic Study of the Direct Selling Industry' Aldershot: Ashgate (ISBN: 0754646092) Moeran, B. (2006) 'Ethnography at Work' New York: Berg, (ISBN: 9781854204983) Venkatesh, S. A. (2006) 'Off the Books: The Underground Economy ofthe Urban Poor Cambridge' London: Harvard University Press (ISBN: 0674023552)
